description_long: This is a large, cylindrical wheel of cheese with a smooth, pale yellow surface and scattered small orange flecks throughout its body, suggesting a semi-hard or semi-soft cheese like Colby Jack or a mild cheddar blend. A single, clean wedge has been cut out, exposing the uniform interior texture and the same coloration as the exterior. The cheese has no visible rind or outer coating, and its surface appears matte with a slight sheen, indicating a fresh, unaged state. The cut edges are straight and even, with no crumbling or roughness, further supporting the semi-soft nature. There are no visible brand markings, packaging, or labels present on the cheese. The cheese is shown resting directly on an undefined, neutral surface with no additional context or props.
description: A large, pale yellow cylindrical cheese wheel with orange flecks and a single wedge cut out, showing a smooth, uniform interior. The cheese has no rind or packaging and sits directly on a plain surface.
description_view_0: The cheese wheel is seen from an angle highlighting the cut wedge, revealing the smooth, pale yellow interior with orange flecks and the clean, straight cut.
description_view_1: This view shows more of the uncut side of the cheese, with the wedge opening receding into the background and the cylindrical shape clearly visible.
description_view_2: The cheese is rotated further, displaying mostly the uncut, rounded exterior and only a small portion of the wedge opening.
description_view_3: The wedge cut is again prominent, but from the opposite side, showing the clean, straight edge and the consistent texture of the cheese.
